Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion For Protective Order By Cross-Defendant/Cross-Complainant, Fellow Industries,
Inc., To Defendant/Cross-Complainant, City And County Of
San Francisco'S Notice Of Site Inspection Of Property Located At 820 Valencia Street; Memorandum Of Points And
Authorities; Request For Sanctions Of $2,450.00 Against
Defendant/Cross-Complainant, City And County Of San
Francisco'S And Its Counsel Of Record; Declaration Of Lisa
Mersereau, Esq.
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: CROSS COMPLAINANT FELLOW INDUSTRIES, INC.'s Motion For Protective Order.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Cross-defendant/cross-complainant Fellow Industries, Inc.'s (Fellow) motion for protective order is granted in part.

Even though the proof of service for the amended notice of inspection was defective, the amended inspection demand was properly served. Fellow does not contend otherwise and admits to receiving it. (Johnston Decl., par. 2; Mersereau Decl., par. 4.) The amended inspection demand is proper under CCP 2031.010 and reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of relevant and admissible evidence (CCP 2017.010). The court does not see why the inspection needs to occur during work hours. The motion sufficiently makes clear the relief it seeks. Sanctions are denied as both sides acted with substantial justification.

The inspection shall occur at 10:00 a.m. by May 27, 2025. Fellow to make sure that an employee arrives early for work to facilitate the inspection. Parties to meet and confer to coordinate precise date of inspection.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
